ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state (FIPS code) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., CA, NY) */,
  "state_census_area" REAL /* Census area of the state in square miles */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to (e.g., Northeast, Midwest) */,
  "state_area_code" TEXT /* Area code(s) used in the state */,
  "state_gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the state */,
  "state_median_income" REAL /* Median household income of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "ufo_sightings" (
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UFO sighting */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the sighting occurred */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the UFO sighting in minutes */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the UFO (e.g., circle, oval, triangle) */,
  "sighting_date" TEXT /* Date of the UFO sighting */,
  "sighting_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the UFO sighting */,
  "sighting_location" TEXT /* Specific location of the UFO sighting (e.g., city, county) */,
  "sighting_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the UFO sighting location */,
  "sighting_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the UFO sighting location */,
  "sighting_time" TEXT /* Time of the UFO sighting (e.g., 14:30) */,
  "sighting_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the UFO sighting */,
  "sighting_reporter" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the person reporting the UFO sighting */,
  "sighting_source" TEXT /* Source of the UFO sighting report (e.g., eyewitness, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ufo_sightings_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state in people per square mile */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "state_median_age" REAL /* Median age of the state population */,
  "state_gender_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of males to females in the state */,
  "state_education_level" TEXT /* Average education level in the state */,
  "state_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  "state_poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the state */,
  "state_crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "user_first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "user_last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "user_state_code" INTEGER /* State code of the user */,
  "user_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "user_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("user_state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "role_permission_level" INTEGER /* Permission level of the role (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape */,
  "shape_name" TEXT /* Name of the shape (e.g., circle, oval, triangle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shape */,
  "shape_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the shape */,
  "shape_common_name" TEXT /* Common name or nickname for the shape */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_shapes_data" (
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shape */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the shape in UFO sightings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code", "shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_durations" (
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the UFO sighting in minutes */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the duration in UFO sightings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code", "duration")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_dates" (
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "sighting_date" TEXT /* Date of the UFO sighting */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the date in UFO sightings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code", "sighting_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_statistics" (
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "total_sightings" INTEGER /* Total number of UFO sightings in the state */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of UFO sightings in the state in minutes */,
  "max_duration" REAL /* Maximum duration of UFO sightings in the state in minutes */,
  "min_duration" REAL /* Minimum duration of UFO sightings in the state in minutes */,
  "median_duration" REAL /* Median duration of UFO sightings in the state in minutes */,
  "total_duration" REAL /* Total duration of all UFO sightings in the state in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)
